title: Faster Boats
description: Makes your slow boat faster by holding down your sprinting key.
body:
Don't you love minecraft logic of that a normal player that has Dolphin's grace effect is faster in water than a player who is riding a boat?
Or don't you love World Generation that is always full of water and even with your boat your still taking ages to find any land?
With a click of a button you are going to destroy all of these beloved stuff in minecraft!
It's your sprinting Key!
